nasb.text: Have the workers of wickedness no knowledge, Who eat up My people as though they ate bread And have not called upon God?

esv.text: Have those who work evil no knowledge, who eat up my people as they eat bread, and do not call upon God?

cnv.text: 作惡的都是無知的嗎？ 他們吞吃我的子民好像吃飯一樣， 並不求告　神。

ccb.text: 恶人吞吃我的百姓如同吃饭， 他们不求告上帝。 难道他们无知吗？

csbs.text: 难道作恶的都不明白吗？ 他们吞噬我的子民像吃饭那样， 他们不呼求神。
